name: BREAK
notes: SAC forbids BREAK in production code; use ZBREAK during debugging only.

name: JOB
notes: JOB requires explicit IRMS/site approval; not for general use.

name: XECUTE
notes: XECUTE on user-supplied input is forbidden; restricted to controlled cases.

name: ZINSERT
notes: Source-modification at runtime forbidden in production.

name: ZLOAD
notes: Source-modification at runtime forbidden in production.

name: ZREMOVE
notes: Source-modification at runtime forbidden in production.

name: ZSAVE
notes: Source-modification at runtime forbidden in production.

name: ZSYSTEM
notes: Shell escape disallowed in VistA application code.

name: $ZSEARCH
notes: Direct filesystem access restricted; use FileMan APIs instead.

name: $ZA
notes: Vendor-specific device status; non-portable; SAC requires use of $DEVICE.
